# Estimate Quote Module

Module ID: estimate-quote
Status: draft
Purpose: Estimate/quote lifecycle with integer-cents totals, expiry, acceptance, voiding, and invoice conversion metadata.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/estimate-quote check:spec
Build: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/estimate-quote build
Test: pnpm --filter @microservices-sh/estimate-quote test
